_comment: Two-way DesignSync config — see DESIGNSYNC.md. The Claude Design project is the source of truth; this repo mirrors it under localDir. Used as the target + localDir for the DesignSync MCP tool.
name: Watermark Design System

notes.synced: Foundations + all 27 component specs (components/**, ui_kits/**) + 11 guideline cards are mirrored. Drift vs the live Astro impls is recorded in COMPONENT-AUDIT.md; reconciliation (Stage 2) is gated on review. On the next pull, move newly-synced paths here from `pending`.
notes.pending: Only assets/brand/** remains (intentionally — see below). On a future pull, the exact paths come from DesignSync list_files.
notes.generated: Authored by the Claude Design app's self-check / tooling — never mirror or push these.
notes.assets/brand/**: Brand binaries already live in frontend/public/ (favicons, app icons); only mirror here if you want them version-controlled in the design system too.
